name: Bilateral Mastectomy Procedure Codes
description: CPT and ICD-10-PCS codes for bilateral mastectomy procedures. Used as an exclusion in the breast cancer screening (BCS) measure, since members who have undergone bilateral mastectomy are excluded from the screening denominator.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Mastectomy, radical, including pectoral muscles, axillary lymph nodes
Mastectomy, radical, including pectoral muscles, axillary and internal mammary lymph nodes (Urban type)
Mastectomy, modified radical, including axillary lymph nodes, with or without pectoralis minor muscle
Acquired absence of unspecified breast and nipple
Acquired absence of right breast and nipple
Acquired absence of left breast and nipple
Acquired absence of bilateral breasts and nipples
Bilateral procedure modifier — applied to unilateral mastectomy CPT codes to indicate bilateral
